subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Say: O people of the Bayán, fear ye the All-Merciful. This is the Ḥusayn Who was promised in the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قل یا ملا البیان اتقوا الرحمن هذا هو الحسین الذی کان موعودا فی کتاب
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @prophecy and fulfillment, @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God
